summary: Targeted frontend testing for 3 bug fixes: Inputs section visibility, Sidebar brand icon, and Muna font. All 3 fixes verified as working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 fixes verified: (1) حقول الإدخال (Inputs) section renders correctly with styled inputs, textarea, checkbox, toggle, select — CSS token vars injected properly. (2) Sidebar shows img[alt='Sahib'] brand icon, no orange 'DS' div. (3) Body font is 'Muna, Segoe UI, Arial, system-ui, sans-serif'. Dark mode also works. Buttons section renders correctly in both light and dark modes.
